data.name: Add Global Password
data.value: Add Global Password

data.name: Add New Roles
data.value: Add New Roles

data.name: Add New Users
data.value: Add New Users

data.name: Allows approving or rejecting any leave application, regardless of the reporting line, and viewing any user's leave history.
data.value: Allows approving or rejecting any leave application, regardless of the reporting line, and viewing any user's leave history.

data.name: Allows approving or rejecting any leave application, regardless of the reporting line.
data.value: Allows approving or rejecting any leave application, regardless of the reporting line.

data.name: Allows approving, acknowledging, or rejecting reimbursement requests from any employee.
data.value: Allows approving, acknowledging, or rejecting reimbursement requests from any employee.

data.name: Allows approving, rejecting, or requesting changes for project requirements. Everyone can submit requirements and comment on them.
data.value: Allows approving, rejecting, or requesting changes to project requirements. Everyone can submit requirements and comment on them.

data.name: Allows assigning or removing roles for any user.
data.value: Allows assigning or removing roles for any user.

data.name: Allows creating and managing all contracts for the company.
data.value: Allows creating and managing all contracts for the company.

data.name: Allows creating and managing onboarding task templates for new employees.
data.value: Allows creating and managing onboarding task templates for new employees.

data.name: Allows creating contracts for the company. Every user can view public contracts by default
data.value: Allows creating contracts for the company. Every user can view public contracts by default

data.name: Allows creating new global passwords that can be shared with others.
data.value: Allows creating new global passwords that can be shared with others.

data.name: Allows creating questions, questionnaires, and viewing feedback responses.
data.value: Allows creating questions, questionnaires, and viewing feedback responses.

data.name: Allows creating, editing, and deleting weekly reports on behalf of any other user.
data.value: Allows creating, editing, and deleting weekly reports on behalf of any other user.

data.name: Allows creating, updating, and deleting blueprints. Every user can view blueprints by default.
data.value: Allows creating, updating, and deleting blueprints. Every user can view blueprints by default.

data.name: Allows creating, updating, and deleting collection channels and their records.
data.value: Allows creating, updating, and deleting collection channels and their records.

data.name: Allows creating, updating, and deleting company entity information.
data.value: Allows creating, updating, and deleting company entity information.

data.name: Allows creating, updating, and deleting company entity information. Every user can view company entity information by default.
data.value: Allows creating, updating, and deleting company entity information. Every user can view company entity information by default.

data.name: Allows creating, updating, and deleting customer relationship information. Every user can view customer relationships by default.
data.value: Allows creating, updating, and deleting customer relationship information. Every user can view customer relationships by default.

data.name: Allows creating, updating, and deleting market channel information. Every user can view market channels by default.
data.value: Allows creating, updating, and deleting market channel information. Every user can view market channels by default.

data.name: Allows creating, updating, and deleting services and DNS providers. Every user can view services by default.
data.value: Allows creating, updating, and deleting services and DNS providers. Every user can view services by default.

data.name: Allows issuing and managing payroll slips for all users.
data.value: Allows issuing and managing payroll slips for all users.

data.name: Allows managing and deleting any global password created by any user.
data.value: Allows managing and deleting any global password created by any user.

data.name: Allows managing the company's financial accounts and recording transactions.
data.value: Allows managing the company's financial accounts and recording transactions.

data.name: Allows managing the company's IT assets and intangible assets (like domains, licenses), including categories, models, and individual items. Also allows assigning and recovering assets to/from employees.
data.value: Allows managing the company's IT assets and intangible assets (such as domains, licenses), including categories, models, and individual items. Also allows assigning and recovering assets to or from employees.

data.name: Allows managing the company's IT assets, including categories, models, and individual items.
data.value: Allows managing the company's IT assets, including categories, models, and individual items.

data.name: Allows managing the company's IT assets, including categories, models, and individual items. Also allows assigning and recovering assets to/from employees.
data.value: Allows managing the company's IT assets, including categories, models, and individual items. Also allows assigning and recovering assets to/from employees.

data.name: Allows modification of role names and their assigned permissions.
data.value: Allows modification of role names and their assigned permissions.

data.name: Allows modification of user details like email and roles, and can also reset user passwords.
data.value: Allows modification of user details such as email and roles, and also enables resetting of user passwords.

data.name: Allows modification of user details like email and roles, resetting user passwords, and viewing sensitive user details like payroll.
data.value: Allows modification of user details like email and roles, resetting user passwords, and viewing sensitive user details like payroll.

data.name: Allows printing employment and income certificates for any employee.
data.value: Allows printing employment and income certificates for any employee.

data.name: Allows printing employment and income certificates for oneself.
data.value: Allows printing employment and income certificates for oneself.

data.name: Allows the permanent deletion of roles.
data.value: Allows the permanent deletion of roles.

data.name: Allows the permanent deletion of user accounts.
data.value: Allows the permanent deletion of user accounts.

data.name: Allows the user to create their own weekly reports.
data.value: Allows the user to create their own weekly reports.

data.name: Allows the user to fill out and submit feedback questionnaires.
data.value: Allows the user to fill out and submit feedback questionnaires.

data.name: Allows the user to submit reimbursement requests for their expenses.
data.value: Allows the user to submit reimbursement requests for their expenses.

data.name: Allows viewing all company contracts, including those marked as private.
data.value: Allows viewing all company contracts, including those marked as private.

data.name: Allows viewing all company contracts, including those marked as private. Everyone can view public contracts by default
data.value: Allows viewing all company contracts, including those marked as private. Everyone can view public contracts by default

data.name: Allows viewing and modifying global application settings.
data.value: Allows viewing and modifying global application settings.

data.name: Allows viewing system-level information and settings.
data.value: Allows viewing system-level information and settings.

data.name: Allows viewing the background job dashboard and managing jobs.
data.value: Allows viewing the background job dashboard and managing jobs.

data.name: Allows viewing the list of all collection channels and their records.
data.value: Allows viewing the list of all collection channels and their records.

data.name: Allows viewing the list of all permissions and their assignments to roles and users.
data.value: Allows viewing the list of all permissions and their assignments to roles and users.

data.name: Allows viewing the list of all users.
data.value: Allows viewing the list of all users.

data.name: Allows viewing the list of roles and their assigned permissions.
data.value: Allows viewing the list of roles and their assigned permissions.

data.name: Allows viewing the operation logs of any user, including their bank card change history.
data.value: Allows viewing the operation logs of any user, including their bank card change history.

data.name: Allows viewing the report line of any user, including their manager, subordinates, and peers.
data.value: Allows viewing the report line of any user, including their manager, subordinates, and peers.

data.name: Allows viewing, editing, and deleting any user's SSH keys.
data.value: Allows viewing, editing, and deleting any user's SSH keys.

data.name: Grants permission to create new roles.
data.value: Grants permission to create new roles.

data.name: Grants permission to create new user accounts.

data.name: Grants permission to restart the application instance. May cause availability interruptions but all settings and cache will be reloaded.
data.value: Grants permission to restart the application instance. May cause availability interruptions but all settings and cache will be reloaded.
